name: better-telegram-mcp
description: Production-grade MCP server for Telegram — dual-mode Bot API + MTProto, 6 mega-tools for messages, chats, media, contacts, config, and help

install.instructions: Set TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN env var for bot mode, or TELEGRAM_API_ID + TELEGRAM_API_HASH + TELEGRAM_PHONE for user mode.

env_vars.name: TELEGRAM_API_ID
env_vars.description: Telegram API ID from my.telegram.org (user mode)

env_vars.name: TELEGRAM_API_HASH
env_vars.description: Telegram API hash from my.telegram.org (user mode)

env_vars.name: TELEGRAM_PHONE
env_vars.description: Phone number for user mode authentication
